nodes.context: Hispanic street gang based in Buffalo, New York, involved in drug trafficking and violent crime.
Rival gang based in Buffalo, New York, involved in drug trade and violence.
Large Hispanic street gang with national presence, allied with 7th Street Gang.

edges.context: The 7th Street Gang and 10th Street Gang were heated rivals, with violence surging in 2009 including shootings and murders.
The 7th Street Gang had an alliance with the Latin Kings as stated in the infobox.
